github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: The first line must be an imperative summary (<=50 chars) starting with one of: `FEAT:`|`FIX:`|`REFACTOR:`|`DOCS:`|`TESTS:`|`CHORE:`|`BUILD:`|`CI:`|`PERF:`|`SECURITY:`|`REVERT:`|`BREAKING CHANGE:`. The second line is blank. The body must be bullet points, each starting with `-`, covering: Why (context), What changed (high-level), How validated (tests/CI/manual steps), Risk/Impact and rollback, Docs updated (if any), and Security considerations. Add a footer for references using `Refs: #<issue>` and `ADR: <id>` if applicable. Any security-related bullet must start with `SECURITY:`. Any bullet describing a breaking change must start with `BREAKING CHANGE:`.
